channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: World champion Russian skaters on American Airlines jet built a new life as coaches in the US
item.description: TALLINN, Estonia (AP) — The two Russian figure skating coaches killed in the American Airlines crash were two-time Olympians and former world champions in the pairs event. They were also a married couple with a son who finished fourth last week at the U.S. national championships in Wichita, Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rory McIlroy dunks 2nd career hole-in-one at Pebble Beach Pro-Am
item.description: In Rory McIlroy's sixth hole of the PGA season, he slam-dunked a hole in one on the 15th hole at Spyglass Golf Course at the Pebble Beach Pro-Am on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: American ice skater Anton Spiridonov 'was not on' the plane that collided with an Army helicopter
item.description: American Airlines Flight 5342 was on final approach to Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport in Virginia when the plane and a Black Hawk helicopter collided Jan. 29.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Skating broadcasters Tara Lipinski, Johnny Weir emotional discussing 'unimaginable' loss from plane crash
item.description: Figure skating broadcasters Tara Lipinski and Johnny Weir were emotional in discussing the plane crash that is presumed to have taken the lives of many skaters.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Super Bowl 2025: Time, channel, halftime show, how to watch Chiefs vs. Eagles livestream
item.description: Kansas City's quest to become the first team to win three consecutive Super Bowls is a go. The Philadelphia Eagles are the last team standing that could stop them. Quarterback Patrick Mahomes and the Chiefs are back in the NFL title game — which will be on Feb.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Dwyane Wade reveals cancer diagnosis, kidney surgery
item.description: The Chicago native shared the story of the "shocking" diagnosis and the emotional toll it took on him on the latest episode of his 'The Why' podcast.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, WGN 9

item.title: Florida coach Todd Golden 'happy to put it behind us' after school clears him in Title IX case
item.description: Florida coach Todd Golden is ready to move on, with any potential legal response to come after the season.
item.dc:creator: Mark Long, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Unusual betting patterns surrounding play of Terry Rozier in 2023 game with Charlotte investigated
item.description: Unusual betting patterns surrounding the play of then-Charlotte Hornets guard Terry Rozier in a game nearly two years ago are now under investigation by federal prosecutors, part of the same probe that led to the lifetime ban of Toronto Raptors player Jontay Porter, the NBA confirmed Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Plane crashes in sports have devastated pro teams and college programs
item.description: The crash of an American Airlines jet that collided with an Army helicopter was the latest to strike the sports world in the U.S. and globally. Among the passengers were several members of the Skating Club of Boston who were returning from the U.S. Figure Skating Championships in Wichita, Kansas.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Nashville bids for WNBA franchise with Candace Parker and Peyton Manning among investors
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — The chairman of the NHL's Nashville Predators and his wife want to bring the WNBA to Music City and have teamed up with a star-filled investor group including Candace Parker, Pro Football Hall of Fame quarterback Peyton Manning and entertainers Tim McGraw and Faith Hill.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Emotions pour from tight-knit skating community following DC plane crash carrying athletes, coaches
item.description: The tight-knit figure skating community was rocked Wednesday when an American Airlines flight carrying athletes, parents and coaches from a development camp in Wichita, Kansas, collided with an Army helicopter and crashed into the Potomac River.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wisconsin's Fourqurean files injunction saying Division II years shouldn't count against eligibility
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Wisconsin cornerback Nyzier Fourqurean has filed an injunction saying the two seasons he played at Division II program Grand Valley State shouldn’t count against his college eligibility.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WWE star ‘feeling in danger’ after scary ‘romantic’ advances during fan interactions
item.description: Asuka, the 43-year-old WWE superstar, posted a series of statements on Wednesday night explaining how she feels in danger after recent fan interactions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Teens from a Boston skating club, their mothers, and coaches among passengers killed in air crash
item.description: Passengers aboard the American Airlines flight that collided with an Army helicopter and crashed into the Potomac River included athletes returning from the U.S. Figure Skating Championships and their Russian coaches.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The Chiefs will seek another Super Bowl sweep in a title game rematch against the Eagles
item.description: Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs keep finding themselves on one side of a Super Bowl rematch.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aggies avenge loss to UNLV, 76-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Five Aggies scored in double figures, as Utah State avenged its only Mountain West Conference loss of the season against UNLV Wednesday night, 76-71.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Crosby's overtime goal beats Utah HC, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Sidney Crosby scored with 1:06 left in overtime as the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Wednesday. It was Crosby's 95th career game-winning goal, moving him past Steve Yzerman for the 13th most in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 52 but Curry and Wiggins lead balanced Warriors past Thunder 116-109
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry hit a long 3-pointer with 1:52 left on the way to 21 points, Andrew Wiggins scored 27 and the Golden State Warriors beat the Western Conference-leading Oklahoma City Thunder 116-109 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man City rallies to beat Club Brugge and advance in Champions League. PSG also wins and stays in
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — Manchester City stayed in the Champions League, barely. Paris Saint-Germain saved its elite status in style. Both had risked embarrassing exits before winning on Wednesday, grateful to be among the 24 teams in the knockout stage.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah Hockey Club narrows the choice of a permanent name to three finalists. It won't be the Yeti
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club has chosen three finalists for the permanent team name it will adopt beginning with the 2025-26 NHL season. The franchise will use a final round of fan voting to decide among the Utah Mammoth, Utah Hockey Club and Utah Wasatch.
item.dc:creator: JOHN COON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl LIX will be 'No Drone Zone' amid incursions
item.description: Airspace over the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans will be heavily restricted from drones during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Bill Belichick jokes Lombardi Trophy should be renamed after Tom Brady
item.description: Legendary NFL head coach Bill Belichick joked on the latest episode of the "Let's Go!" podcast that the Vince Lombardi Trophy should be renamed after Tom Brady.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Golden State Warriors to retire Andre Iguodala’s jersey number
item.description: (KRON) – The Golden State Warriors announced on Tuesday that the team will be retiring four-time NBA champion and 2015 Finals MVP Andre Iguodala’s No. 9 jersey.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Jets agree to terms with Broncos executive Darren Mougey to be their general manager
item.description: The New York Jets' lengthy searches are over, and they're pairing a first-time general manager with a first-time head coach to try to turn things around.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK JR., Associated Press, Fox 5
